repos.name: chopratejas/headroom
repos.desc: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

repos.name: microsoft/markitdown
repos.desc: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

repos.name: affaan-m/ECC
repos.desc: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

repos.name: D4Vinci/Scrapling
repos.desc: 🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

repos.name: nesquena/hermes-webui
repos.desc: Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!

repos.name: reconurge/flowsint
repos.desc: A modern platform for visual, flexible, and extensible graph-based investigations. For cybersecurity analysts and investigators.

repos.name: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
repos.desc: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

repos.name: stefan-jansen/machine-learning-for-trading
repos.desc: Code for Machine Learning for Algorithmic Trading, 2nd edition.

repos.name: supermemoryai/supermemory
repos.desc: Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.

repos.name: Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
repos.desc: Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms

blog_md:
# 🍿 程序员今日吃瓜：headroom 爆火，Python 又双叒叕赢了

> 📅 2026-06-03  |  🔍 共收录 11 个热门项目

警告：以下内容可能导致大量 star 行为、clone 冲动以及「我也能做」的幻觉。请谨慎阅读 ⚠️

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**Python**: 7 | **TypeScript**: 2 | **JavaScript**: 1 | **Jupyter Notebook**: 1

> Python 选手：pip install 一下，问题解决了一半。另一半是版本冲突。

---
